title: Angry Video Game Nerd: The Movie
original_title: Angry Video Game Nerd: The Movie
overview: Based on the hit web series of the same name, a disgruntled gamer must overcome his fear of the worst video game of all time in order to save his fans. Hilarity ensues as a simple road trip becomes an extravagant pursuit of the unexpected.
